text: vayehi ish echad min-haramatayim tsovfim mehar eferayim ushemov eleqana ben-yerocham ben-elihu ben-tochu ven-tsuf eferati
velov shetey nashim shem achat chana veshem hashenit penina vayehi lifenina yeladim ulechana eyn yeladim
ve'ala haish hahu me'irov miyamim ׀ yamima lehishetachaot velizebocha layhva tsevaovt beshilo vesham sheney veney-'eli chafeni ufinechas kohanim layhva
vayehi hayovm vayizebach eleqana venatan lifenina ishetov ulekhal-baneyha uvenovteyha manovt
ulechana yiten mana achat apayim ki et-chana ahev vayhva sagar rachemah
vekhi'asata tsaratah gam-ka'as ba'avur hare'imah ki-sagar yehva be'ad rachemah
vekhen ya'ase shana veshana midey 'alotah beveyt yehva ken takhe'isena vativeke velo tokhal
vayomer lah eleqana ishah chana lame tiveki velame lo tokheli velame yera' levavekh halov anokhi tovv lakh me'asara banim
vataqam chana acharey akhela veshilo veacharey shato ve'eli hakohen yoshev 'al-hakise 'al-mezuzat heykhal yehva
vehi marat nafesh vatitepalel 'al-yehva uvakho tiveke

vatidor neder vatomar yehva tsevaovt im-rao tiree ׀ ba'oni amatekha uzekharetani velo-tishekach et-amatekha venatata laamatekha zera' anashim unetativ layhva kal-yemey chayayv umovra lo-ya'ale 'al-roshov
vehaya ki hirebeta lehitepalel lifeney yehva ve'eli shomer et-piha
vechana hi medaberet 'al-libah raq sefateyha na'ovt veqovlah lo yishame'a vayachesheveha 'eli leshikora
vayomer eleyha 'eli 'ad-matay tishetakarin hasiri et-yeynekh me'alayikh
vata'an chana vatomer lo adoni isha qeshat-rucha anokhi veyayin veshekhar lo shatiti vaeshepokh et-nafeshi lifeney yehva
al-titen et-amatekha lifeney bat-beliya'al ki-merov sichi vekha'esi dibareti 'ad-hena
vaya'an 'eli vayomer lekhi leshalovm velohey yiserael yiten et-shelatekh asher shaalet me'imov
vatomer timetsa shifechatekha chen be'eyneykha vatelekh haisha ledarekah vatokhal ufaneyha lo-hayu-lah 'ovd
vayashekimu vaboqer vayishetachavu lifeney yehva vayashuvu vayavou el-beytam haramata vayeda' eleqana et-chana ishetov vayizekereha yehva
vayehi litequfovt hayamim vatahar chana vateled ben vatiqera et-shemov shemuel ki meyehva sheiletiv
vaya'al haish eleqana vekhal-beytov lizebocha layhva et-zevach hayamim veet-niderov
vechana lo 'alata ki-amera leishah 'ad yigamel hana'ar vahaviotiv venirea et-peney yehva veyashav sham 'ad-'ovlam
vayomer lah eleqana ishah 'asi hatovv be'eynayikh shevi 'ad-gamelekh otov akh yaqem yehva et-devarov vateshev haisha vateyneq et-benah 'ad-gamelah otov
vata'alehu 'imah kaasher gemalatu befarim shelosha veeyfa achat qemach venevel yayin vateviehu veyt-yehva shilov vehana'ar na'ar
vayishechatu et-hapar vayaviu et-hana'ar el-'eli
vatomer bi adoni chey nafeshekha adoni ani haisha hanitsevet 'imekha baze lehitepalel el-yehva
el-hana'ar haze hitepalaleti vayiten yehva li et-sheelati asher shaaleti me'imov
vegam anokhi hisheiletihu layhva kal-hayamim asher haya hu shaul layhva vayishetachu sham layhva f

eyn-qadovsh kayhva ki eyn biletekha veeyn tsur keloheynu

qeshet giborim chatim venikheshalim azeru chayil
seve'im balechem nisekaru ure'evim chadelu 'ad-'aqara yaleda shive'a verabat banim umelala
yehva memit umechaye movrid sheovl vaya'al
yehva movrish uma'ashir mashepil af-merovmem
meqim me'afar dal meashepot yarim eveyovn lehovshiv 'im-nedivim vekhise khavovd yanechilem ki layhva metsuqey erets vayashet 'aleyhem tevel
rageley chasidov kh chasidayv q yishemor uresha'im bachoshekh yidamu ki-lo vekhocha yigebar-ish
yehva yechatu merivov kh merivayv q 'alov kh 'alayv q bashamayim yare'em yehva yadin afesey-arets veyiten-'oz lemalekov veyarem qeren meshichov f
vayelekh eleqana haramata 'al-beytov vehana'ar haya mesharet et-yehva et-peney 'eli hakohen
uveney 'eli beney veliya'al lo yade'u et-yehva
umishepat hakohanim et-ha'am kal-ish zovecha zevach uva na'ar hakohen kevashel habasar vehamazeleg shelosh-hashinayim beyadov
vehika vakiyovr ov vadud ov vaqalachat ov vaparur kol asher ya'ale hamazeleg yiqach hakohen bov kakha ya'asu lekhal-yiserael habaim sham beshilo
gam beterem yaqetirun et-hachelev uva ׀ na'ar hakohen veamar laish hazovecha tena vasar litselovt lakohen velo-yiqach mimekha basar mevushal ki im-chay
vayomer elayv haish qater yaqetirun kayovm hachelev veqach-lekha kaasher teave nafeshekha veamar ׀ lov kh lo q ki 'ata titen veim-lo laqacheti vechazeqa
vatehi chatat hane'arim gedovla meod et-peney yehva ki niatsu haanashim et minechat yehva
ushemuel mesharet et-peney yehva na'ar chagur efovd bad
ume'il qaton ta'aseh-lov imov veha'aleta lov miyamim ׀ yamima ba'alovtah et-ishah lizebocha et-zevach hayamim
uverakh 'eli et-eleqana veet-ishetov veamar yasem yehva lekha zera' min-haisha hazot tachat hasheela asher shaal layhva vehalekhu limeqomov
ki-faqad yehva et-chana vatahar vateled sheloshah-vanim ushetey vanovt vayigedal hana'ar shemuel 'im-yehva s
ve'eli zaqen meod veshama' et kal-asher ya'asun banayv lekhal-yiserael veet asher-yishekevun et-hanashim hatsoveovt petach ohel mov'ed
vayomer lahem lama ta'asun kadevarim haele asher anokhi shome'a et-divereykhem ra'im meet kal-ha'am ele
al banay ki lov-tovva hashemu'a asher anokhi shome'a ma'avirim 'am-yehva
im-yecheta ish leish ufilelov elohim veim layhva yecheta-ish mi yitepalel-lov velo yisheme'u leqovl avihem ki-chafets yehva lahamitam
vehana'ar shemuel holekh vegadel vatovv gam 'im-yehva vegam 'im-anashim s
vayavo ish-elohim el-'eli vayomer elayv ko amar yehva hanigelo nigeleyti el-beyt avikha biheyovtam bemitserayim leveyt pare'o
uvachor otov mikal-shivetey yiserael li lekhohen la'alovt 'al-mizebechi lehaqetir qetoret laset efovd lefanay vaetena leveyt avikha et-kal-ishey beney yiserael
lama tive'atu bezivechi uveminechati asher tsiviti ma'ovn vatekhabed et-baneykha mimeni lehaveriakhem mereshit kal-minechat yiserael le'ami
lakhen neum-yehva elohey yiserael amovr amareti beytekha uveyt avikha yitehalekhu lefanay 'ad-'ovlam ve'ata neum-yehva chalila li ki-mekhabeday akhabed uvozay yeqalu
hine yamim baim vegada'eti et-zero'akha veet-zero'a beyt avikha miheyovt zaqen beveytekha
vehibateta tsar ma'ovn bekhol asher-yeytiv et-yiserael velo-yiheye zaqen beveytekha kal-hayamim
veish lo-akherit lekha me'im mizebechi lekhalovt et-'eyneykha velaadiv et-nafeshekha vekhal-marebit beytekha yamutu anashim
vezeh-lekha haovt asher yavo el-sheney vaneykha el-chafeni ufinechas beyovm echad yamutu sheneyhem
vahaqimoti li kohen neeman kaasher bilevavi uvenafeshi ya'ase uvaniti lov bayit neeman vehtehalekh lifeney-meshichi kal-hayamim
vehaya kal-hanovtar beveytekha yavov lehishetachaot lov laagovrat kesef vekhikar-lachem veamar sefacheni na el-achat hakehunovt leekhol pat-lachem s
vehana'ar shemuel mesharet et-yehva lifeney 'eli udevar-yehva haya yaqar bayamim hahem eyn chazovn niferats s
vayehi bayovm hahu ve'eli shokhev bimeqomov ve'eynov kh ve'eynayv q hechelu khehovt lo yukhal lireovt
vener elohim terem yikhebe ushemuel shokhev beheykhal yehva asher-sham arovn elohim f
vayiqera yehva el-shemuel vayomer hineni
vayarats el-'eli vayomer hineni ki-qarata li vayomer lo-qarati shuv shekhav vayelekh vayishekav s
vayosef yehva qero 'ovd shemuel vayaqam shemuel vayelekh el-'eli vayomer hineni ki qarata li vayomer lo-qarati veni shuv shekhav
ushemuel terem yada' et-yehva veterem yigale elayv devar-yehva
vayosef yehva qero-shemuel bashelishit vayaqam vayelekh el-'eli vayomer hineni ki qarata li vayaven 'eli ki yehva qore lana'ar
vayomer 'eli lishemuel lekh shekhav vehaya im-yiqera eleykha veamareta daber yehva ki shome'a 'avedekha vayelekh shemuel vayishekav bimeqovmov
vayavo yehva vayiteyatsav vayiqera khefa'am-befa'am shemuel ׀ shemuel vayomer shemuel daber ki shome'a 'avedekha f
vayomer yehva el-shemuel hine anokhi 'ose davar beyiserael asher kal-shome'ov tetsileyna shetey azenayv
bayovm hahu aqim el-'eli et kal-asher dibareti el-beytov hachel vekhale
vehigadeti lov ki-shofet ani et-beytov 'ad-'ovlam ba'aon asher-yada' ki-meqalelim lahem banayv velo khiha bam
velakhen nisheba'eti leveyt 'eli im-yitekaper 'aon beyt-'eli bezevach uveminecha 'ad-'ovlam
vayishekav shemuel 'ad-haboqer vayifetach et-daletovt beyt-yehva ushemuel yare mehagid et-hamarea el-'eli
vayiqera 'eli et-shemuel vayomer shemuel beni vayomer hineni
vayomer ma hadavar asher diber eleykha al-na tekhached mimeni ko ya'aseh-lekha elohim vekho yovsif im-tekhached mimeni davar mikal-hadavar asher-diber eleykha
vayaged-lov shemuel et-kal-hadevarim velo khiched mimenu vayomar yehva hu hatovv be'eynav ya'ase f
vayigedal shemuel vayhva haya 'imov velo-hipil mikal-devarayv aretsa
vayeda' kal-yiserael midan ve'ad-beer shava' ki neeman shemuel lenavi layhva
vayosef yehva leherao veshilo ki-nigela yehva el-shemuel beshilov bidevar yehva f
vayehi devar-shemuel lekhal-yiserael vayetse yiserael liqerat pelishetim lamilechama vayachanu 'al-haeven ha'ezer ufelishetim chanu vaafeq
vaya'arekhu felishetim liqerat yiserael vatitosh hamilechama vayinagef yiserael lifeney felishetim vayaku vama'arakha basade keareba'at alafim ish
vayavo ha'am el-hamachane vayomeru ziqeney yiserael lama negafanu yehva hayovm lifeney felishetim niqecha eleynu mishilo et-arovn berit yehva veyavo veqirebenu veyoshi'enu mikaf oyeveynu
vayishelach ha'am shilo vayiseu misham et arovn berit-yehva tsevaovt yoshev hakeruvim vesham sheney veney-'eli 'im-arovn berit haelohim chafeni ufinechas
vayehi kevov arovn berit-yehva el-hamachane vayari'u khal-yiserael teru'a gedovla vatehom haarets
vayisheme'u felishetim et-qovl hateru'a vayomeru me qovl hateru'a hagedovla hazot bemachane ha'iverim vayede'u ki arovn yehva ba el-hamachane
vayireu hapelishetim ki ameru ba elohim el-hamachane vayomeru ovy lanu ki lo hayeta kazot etemovl shileshom
ovy lanu mi yatsilenu miyad haelohim haadirim haele ele hem haelohim hamakim et-mitserayim bekhal-maka bamidebar
hitechazequ viheyu laanashim pelishetim pen ta'avedu la'iverim kaasher 'avedu lakhem viheyitem laanashim venilechametem
vayilachamu felishetim vayinagef yiserael vayanusu ish leohalayv vatehi hamaka gedovla meod vayipol miyiserael sheloshim elef rageli
vaarovn elohim nileqach usheney veney-'eli metu chafeni ufinechas
vayarats ish-bineyamin mehama'arakha vayavo shilo bayovm hahu umadayv qeru'im vaadama 'al-roshov
vayavov vehine 'eli yoshev 'al-hakise yakh kh yad q derekh metsape ki-haya libov chared 'al arovn haelohim vehaish ba lehagid ba'ir vatize'aq kal-ha'ir
vayishema' 'eli et-qovl hatse'aqa vayomer me qovl hehamovn haze vehaish mihar vayavo vayaged le'eli
ve'eli ben-tishe'im ushemone shana ve'eynayv qama velo yakhovl lireovt
vayomer haish el-'eli anokhi haba min-hama'arakha vaani min-hama'arakha naseti hayovm vayomer meh-haya hadavar beni
vaya'an hamevaser vayomer nas yiserael lifeney felishetim vegam magefa gedovla hayeta va'am vegam-sheney vaneykha metu chafeni ufinechas vaarovn haelohim nileqacha f
vayehi kehazekirov ׀ et-arovn haelohim vayipol me'al-hakise achoranit be'ad ׀ yad hasha'ar vatishaver maferaqetov vayamot ki-zaqen haish vekhaved vehu shafat et-yiserael areba'im shana
vekhalatov eshet-pinechas hara lalat vatishema' et-hashemu'a el-hilaqach arovn haelohim umet chamiha veishah vatikhera' vateled ki-nehefekhu 'aleyha tsireyha
ukhe'et mutah vatedaberena hanitsavovt 'aleyha al-tirei ki ven yaladet velo 'aneta velo-shata libah
vatiqera lana'ar i-khavovd lemor gala khavovd miyiserael el-hilaqach arovn haelohim veel-chamiha veishah
vatomer gala khavovd miyiserael ki nileqach arovn haelohim f
ufelishetim laqechu et arovn haelohim vayeviuhu meeven ha'ezer ashedovda
vayiqechu felishetim et-arovn haelohim vayaviu otov beyt dagovn vayatsigu otov etsel dagovn
vayashekimu ashedovdim mimachorat vehine dagovn nofel lefanayv aretsa lifeney arovn yehva vayiqechu et-dagovn vayashivu otov limeqovmov
vayashekimu vaboqer mimachorat vehine dagovn nofel lefanayv aretsa lifeney arovn yehva verosh dagovn ushetey ׀ kapovt yadayv kerutovt el-hamifetan raq dagovn nishear 'alayv
'al-ken lo-yiderekhu khohaney dagovn vekhal-habaim beyt-dagovn 'al-mifetan dagovn beashedovd 'ad hayovm haze s
vatikhebad yad-yehva el-haashedovdim vayeshimem vayakh otam ba'ofalim kh batechorim q et-ashedovd veet-gevuleyha
vayireu aneshey-ashedovd ki-khen veameru lo-yeshev arovn elohey yiserael 'imanu ki-qasheta yadov 'aleynu ve'al dagovn eloheynu
vayishelechu vayaasefu et-kal-sareney felishetim aleyhem vayomeru mah-na'ase laarovn elohey yiserael vayomeru gat yisov arovn elohey yiserael vayasebu et-arovn elohey yiserael s
vayehi acharey ׀ hesabu otov vatehi yad-yehva ׀ ba'ir mehuma gedovla meod vayakh et-aneshey ha'ir miqaton ve'ad-gadovl vayisateru lahem 'ofalim kh techorim q
vayeshalechu et-arovn haelohim 'eqerovn vayehi kevov arovn haelohim 'eqerovn vayize'aqu ha'eqeronim lemor hesabu elay et-arovn elohey yiserael lahamiteni veet-'ami

vayishelechu vayaasefu et-kal-sareney felishetim vayomeru shalechu et-arovn elohey yiserael veyashov limeqomov velo-yamit oti veet-'ami ki-hayeta mehumat-mavet bekhal-ha'ir kaveda meod yad haelohim sham
vehaanashim asher lo-metu huku ba'ofalim kh batechorim q vata'al shave'at ha'ir hashamayim
vayehi arovn-yehva bisede felishetim shive'a chodashim
vayiqereu felishetim lakohanim velaqosemim lemor mah-na'ase laarovn yehva hovdi'unu bame neshalechenu limeqovmov
vayomeru im-meshalechim et-arovn elohey yiserael al-teshalechu otov reyqam ki-hashev tashivu lov asham az terafeu venovda' lakhem lama lo-tasur yadov mikem
vayomeru ma haasham asher nashiv lov vayomeru misepar sareney felishetim chamisha 'afeley kh techorey q zahav vachamisha 'akheberey zahav ki-magefa achat lekhulam ulesareneykhem

va'asitem tsalemey 'afeleykhem kh techoreykhem q vetsalemey 'akhebereykhem hamashechitim et-haarets unetatem lelohey yiserael kavovd ulay yaqel et-yadov me'aleykhem ume'al eloheykhem ume'al aretsekhem
velama tekhabedu et-levavekhem kaasher kibedu mitserayim ufare'o et-libam halov kaasher hite'alel bahem vayeshalechum vayelekhu
ve'ata qechu va'asu 'agala chadasha echat ushetey farovt 'alovt asher lo-'ala 'aleyhem 'ol vaasaretem et-haparovt ba'agala vahasheyvotem beneyhem meachareyhem habayeta
uleqachetem et-arovn yehva unetatem otov el-ha'agala veet ׀ keley hazahav asher hashevotem lov asham tasimu vaaregaz mitsidov veshilachetem otov vehalakh
ureitem im-derekh gevulov ya'ale beyt shemesh hu 'asa lanu et-hara'a hagedovla hazot veim-lo veyada'enu ki lo yadov nage'a banu miqere hu haya lanu
vaya'asu haanashim ken vayiqechu shetey farovt 'alovt vayaaserum ba'agala veet-beneyhem kalu vabayit
vayasimu et-arovn yehva el-ha'agala veet haaregaz veet 'akheberey hazahav veet tsalemey techoreyhem
vayisharena haparovt baderekh 'al-derekh beyt shemesh bimesila achat halekhu halokh vega'ov velo-saru yamin usemovl vesareney felishetim holekhim achareyhem 'ad-gevul beyt shamesh
uveyt shemesh qotserim qetsir-chitim ba'emeq vayiseu et-'eyneyhem vayireu et-haarovn vayisemechu lireovt
veha'agala baa el-sede yehovshu'a beyt-hashimeshi vata'amod sham vesham even gedovla vayevaqe'u et-'atsey ha'agala veet-haparovt he'elu 'ola layhva s
vehaleviyim hovridu ׀ et-arovn yehva veet-haaregaz asher-itov asher-bov kheley-zahav vayasimu el-haeven hagedovla veaneshey veyt-shemesh he'elu 'olovt vayizebechu zevachim bayovm hahu layhva
vachamisha sareney-felishetim rau vayashuvu 'eqerovn bayovm hahu s
veele techorey hazahav asher heshivu felishetim asham layhva leashedovd echad le'aza echad leasheqelovn echad legat echad le'eqerovn echad s

ve'akheberey hazahav misepar kal-'arey felishetim lachameshet haseranim me'ir mivetsar ve'ad kofer haperazi ve'ad ׀ avel hagedovla asher hinichu 'aleyha et arovn yehva 'ad hayovm haze bisede yehovshu'a beyt-hashimeshi
vayakh beaneshey veyt-shemesh ki rau baarovn yehva vayakh ba'am shive'im ish chamishim elef ish vayiteabelu ha'am ki-hika yehva ba'am maka gedovla ׃
vayomeru aneshey veyt-shemesh mi yukhal la'amod lifeney yehva haelohim haqadovsh haze veel-mi ya'ale me'aleynu s
vayishelechu maleakhim el-yovshevey qireyat-ye'arim lemor heshivu felishetim et-arovn yehva redu ha'alu otov aleykhem
vayavou aneshey ׀ qireyat ye'arim vaya'alu et-arovn yehva vayaviu otov el-beyt avinadav bagive'a veet-ele'azar benov qideshu lishemor et-arovn yehva f
vayehi miyovm shevet haarovn beqireyat ye'arim vayirebu hayamim vayiheyu 'eserim shana vayinahu kal-beyt yiserael acharey yehva s

vayomer shemuel el-kal-beyt yiserael lemor im-bekhal-levavekhem atem shavim el-yehva hasiru et-elohey hanekhar mitovkhekhem veha'ashetarovt vehakhinu levavekhem el-yehva ve'iveduhu levadov veyatsel etekhem miyad pelishetim
vayasiru beney yiserael et-habe'alim veet-ha'ashetarot vaya'avedu et-yehva levadov f
vayomer shemuel qivetsu et-kal-yiserael hamitsepata veetepalel ba'adekhem el-yehva
vayiqavetsu hamitsepata vayisheavu-mayim vayishepekhu ׀ lifeney yehva vayatsumu bayovm hahu vayomeru sham chatanu layhva vayishepot shemuel et-beney yiserael bamitsepa
vayisheme'u felishetim ki-hiteqabetsu veney-yiserael hamitsepata vaya'alu sareney-felishetim el-yiserael vayisheme'u beney yiserael vayireu mipeney felishetim
vayomeru veney-yiserael el-shemuel al-tacharesh mimenu mize'oq el-yehva eloheynu veyoshi'enu miyad pelishetim
vayiqach shemuel tele chalav echad vaya'ale kh vaya'alehu q 'ovla kalil layhva vayize'aq shemuel el-yehva be'ad yiserael vaya'anehu yehva
vayehi shemuel ma'ale ha'ovla ufelishetim nigeshu lamilechama beyiserael vayare'em yehva ׀ beqovl-gadovl bayovm hahu 'al-pelishetim vayehumem vayinagefu lifeney yiserael
vayetseu aneshey yiserael min-hamitsepa vayiredefu et-pelishetim vayakum 'ad-mitachat leveyt kar
vayiqach shemuel even achat vayasem beyn-hamitsepa uveyn hashen vayiqera et-shemah even ha'azer vayomar 'ad-hena 'azaranu yehva
